steps.name: VERSIONINFO in build.rs
criteria: Both binaries produced from a single cargo build

steps.name: Event counter and bound port
criteria: Counter equals N after N successful writes across all three endpoints
Counter unchanged when a write returns an error
bound_port reads actual port from TcpListener::local_addr() after bind

steps.name: TrayManager icon tooltip menu
criteria: Tray icon appears in Windows system tray within 2 seconds of start
Tooltip displays 'Norbert Hook Receiver', bound port, and event count
Context menu shows title, port, event count, and a clickable Quit item

steps.name: Shutdown coordinator drain timeout
criteria: Quit menu click causes process to exit code 0 within 3 seconds
When no SQLite write is in flight, process exits immediately
Drain timeout produces stderr warning indicating incomplete drain
